title: Exploring Advanced Platform Customizations: Best Practices, Pitfalls & Use Cases

posts.author: inam (Inam Khan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’m currently working on expanding our use of the monday.com platform and diving deeper into custom workflows, integrations, and app development. I’d love to open a discussion around advanced platform customizations — things like:

  • Custom automation or complex multi-board workflows
  • Using the API or webhooks for unique use cases
  • Experiences with custom apps or 3rd party integrations
  • Limitations you’ve hit and how you worked around them

Some questions to kick things off:

  • What’s the most useful customization you’ve implemented?
  • Have you used the monday.com API or apps framework? Do you have any advice?
  • Are there any gotchas or performance concerns you’ve encountered?

I would love to learn from the community’s experience and share ideas. Looking forward to your insights!
